tools.name: createSurvey
tools.description: Create a new survey with a title, description, and optional settings.

tools.name: listSurveys
tools.description: List all surveys with optional status filter and pagination.

tools.name: getSurvey
tools.description: Get a survey by ID including its questions and response count.

tools.name: cloneSurvey
tools.description: Clone an existing survey with all its questions into a new draft.

tools.name: addQuestion
tools.description: Add a question to a survey with type, text, and optional choices.

tools.name: reorderQuestions
tools.description: Reorder questions in a survey by providing the new question ID sequence.

tools.name: deleteQuestion
tools.description: Delete a question from a survey.

tools.name: submitResponse
tools.description: Submit a response to a survey with answers to each question.

tools.name: listResponses
tools.description: List all responses for a survey with optional pagination.

tools.name: getResults
tools.description: Get aggregated results and analytics for a survey.

tools.name: exportResults
tools.description: Export survey results in CSV or JSON format.
